slug.description: 2–3 word human-readable identifier, lowercase hyphenated. Example: deploy-rollback, expense-approvals

source_idea.description: The verbatim original idea as provided by the user. Set once on v1 only — omit on refinement turns.

problem.description: What pain exists and for whom

target_users.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

goals.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

success_metrics.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

scope_in.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

scope_out.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

priority.description: MoSCoW: must=required for launch, should=high value, could=nice to have, wont=explicitly out of this version

acceptance_criteria.description: Specific, testable conditions that define when this feature is complete. Use given/when/then form or equivalent specific prose. Reject vague criteria ('works correctly', 'is fast'). Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

features.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

assumptions.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

open_questions.description: Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.

decision_log_entry.description: Entry to append to the artifact's decision_log. Omit on v1 if nothing meaningful to record yet.

summary.description: Plain-language description of what was decided or changed in this version.

changed_fields.description: Top-level content fields that changed in this version. Must be a JSON array, never a string. Use [] for empty.
